zh.Grancey-le-Château-Neuvelle, Côte-d'Or,: 法國布格o-達格朗希勒-a奧
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alixent Hélissende des Barres於1225年出生在法國皮卡迪奧易諾時，她的父親Pierre Ier des Barres55歲，母親Elisabeth de Champlitte18歲。她於1245年與Milon VIII de Noyers在法國皮卡迪奧易諾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1273年在法國布格諾也斯享年48歲。

zh-hans.Grancey-le-Château-Neuvelle, Côte-d'Or,: 法国布格o-達格朗希勒-a奧
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alixent Hélissende des Barres于1225年出生在法国皮卡迪奧易諾时，她的父亲Pierre Ier des Barres55岁，母亲Elisabeth de Champlitte18岁。她于1245年与Milon VIII de Noyers在法国皮卡迪奧易諾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1273年在法国布格諾也斯享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: des
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (Alsace and Lorraine): from a shortened form of the German personal name   Debus  .

variants.name: Debus
meanings: German: from a personal name, a vernacular short form of Matthäus (see Matthew ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine); compare Debs .
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, for someone from any of various places called Bus (from a regional form of bois ‘wood’) in Eure, Pas-de-Calais, and Somme.

nameMeanings.name: Barres
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Baron   or   Barran  .

variants.name: Baron
meanings: French, English, Dutch, Polish, Czech, Romanian, and Croatian; Breton (also Le Baron): from Old French barun, baron, Middle English barun, baroun, Middle Dutch baroen, Polish, Czech, Romanian, and dialectal Croatian baron ‘baron’ (i.e. a nobleman ranking below an earl and above a knight), a title of nobility which was in England also awarded to certain freemen of the cities of London and York and of the Cinque Ports. As a surname it is unlikely to be a status name denoting a person of rank. Generally, it referred to service in a baronial household or was acquired as a nickname by a peasant who had ideas above his station or applied to a man showing characteristics of a nobleman. See also 3 and 4 below, compare Barron and Lebaron .
French: habitational name from (Le) Baron, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare   Lebaron  .
German: status name for a freeman or baron, from barūn ‘imperial or church official’, a loanword in Middle High German from Old French (see 1 above).

en.lifeSummary: When Alixent Hélissende des Barres was born in 1225, in Noyon, Oise, Picardie, France, her father, Pierre Ier des Barres, was 55 and her mother, Elisabeth de Champlitte, was 18. She married Milon VIII de Noyers in 1245, in Noyon, Oise, Picardie, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died in 1273, in Noyers, Yonne, Burgundy, France, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alixent Hélissende des Barres est née en 1225, à Noyon, Oise, Picardie, France, son père, Pierre Ier des Barres, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth de Champlitte, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Milon VIII de Noyers en 1245, à Noyon, Oise, Picardie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1273, à Noyers, Yonne, Bourgogne, France, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alixent Hélissende des Barres 1225 in Noyon, Oise, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Pierre Ier des Barres 55 und ihre Mutter Elisabeth de Champlitte 18. Sie hat 1245 in Noyon, Oise, Picardie, Frankreich Milon VIII de Noyers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1273 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Noyers, Yonne, Burgund, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alixent Hélissende des Barres è nata il nel 1225 nel Noyon, Oise, Picardie, Francia, sua padre, Pierre Ier des Barres, aveva 55 anni e sua madre, Elisabeth de Champlitte, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Milon VIII de Noyers nel 1245, nel Noyon, Oise, Picardie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1273, nel Noyers, Yonne, Bourgogne, Francia, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alixent Hélissende des Barresが1225年にフランスピカーディオイゼノイオンで生まれた時，父Pierre Ier des Barresは55歳，母Elisabeth de Champlitteは18歳であった。1245年にフランスピカーディオイゼノイオンでMilon VIII de Noyersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1273年にフランスボウルゴグンイオンノイエルズで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alixent Hélissende des Barres(이)가 1225년 프랑스 피카디 이스 노욘에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Pierre Ier des Barres(은)는 55세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elisabeth de Champlitte(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1245년 프랑스 피카디 이스 노욘에서 Milon VIII de Noyers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1273년 프랑스 부르고그니 욘 노예어스에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alixent Hélissende des Barres nasceu em 1225, em Noyon, Oise, Picardie, França, seu pai, Pierre Ier des Barres, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth de Champlitte, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Milon VIII de Noyers em 1245, em Noyon, Oise, Picardie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1273, em Noyers, Yonne, Bourgogne, França, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alixent Hélissende des Barres родилась в 1225 г. в местности ноен, оис, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Pierre Ier des Barres было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth de Champlitte, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Milon VIII de Noyers в 1245 г. в местности ноен, оис, пикарди, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1273 г. в местности ноиирс, енн, бургогн, Франция в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alixent Hélissende des Barres nació en 1225, en Noyon, Oise, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Pierre Ier des Barres, tenía 55 años y su mamá, Elisabeth de Champlitte, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Milon VIII de Noyers en 1245, en Noyon, Oise, Picardie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en 1273, en Noyers, Yonne, Bourgogne, Francia, a la edad de 48 años.
